SELECT * FROM tracks WHERE genre = 'indie' ORDER BY energy DESC LIMIT 25

SELECT playlists.playlist_id, playlists.title, COUNT(*) AS track_count FROM playlist_tracks JOIN playlists ON playlist_tracks.playlist_id = playlists.playlist_id GROUP BY playlists.playlist_id, playlists.title ORDER BY track_count DESC LIMIT 20
SELECT * FROM listener_profiles RESONATE NEAR (1, 0.82, 0.28, 0.44, 0.20, 0.18, 0.22, 0.83, 0.61, 'Seoul') LIMIT 10
SELECT user_id, COUNT(*) AS play_count FROM listening_events GROUP BY user_id ORDER BY play_count DESC LIMIT 20
